name: Kelly 28 leather handbag
description:
Officially renamed in 1977, the Hermès Kelly was originally called the Sac à Dépêches (which translates to ‘the dispatch bag’). The structured bag’s moniker came into effect in the ‘50s, when Grace Kelly was given one of the bags after wearing it on the set of an Albert Hitchcock movie.
Listing Title: Hermès Black Epsom Kelly Sellier 28 GHW
SKU: Z152638
Condition: Pre-owned 
Condition Description: Officially renamed in 1977, the Hermès Kelly was originally called the Sac à Dépêches (which translates to ‘the dispatch bag’). The structured bag’s moniker came into effect in the ‘50s, when Grace Kelly was given one of the bags after wearing it on the set of an Albert Hitchcock movie.
Handbag Condition: Excellent
Condition Comments: Item is in excellent condition and displays light signs of wear. hairline scratches along hardware. Plastic along closure flap, plaque, and feet.
